data.reason: Engine rewritten as wave loop. Ralph iteration loop replaced with wave.Compute + wave.Runner.RunWave pattern. Removed checkpoint, debounce, UseWorktree, RepoRoot from engine. Wave runner decoupled from engine (no circular import). Engine prompt builder injected into wave runner via PromptFunc.

data.title: Wrapup Harness — agent-driven post-epic steps from .tick/wrapup.md

data.reason: Created step_prompt.go with BuildStepPrompt and BuildRetryPrompt functions, plus WrapupStep type. BuildStepPrompt generates prompts with header, progress checklist, task prompt, verify criteria, and signal instructions. BuildRetryPrompt generates re-prompts when STEP_DONE was missing. Added comprehensive table-driven tests in step_prompt_test.go.
data.title: Build step prompt template with progress checklist

data.note: 2026-04-06 14:32 - Task l0v complete: Created internal/wrapup/step_prompt.go with WrapupStep type (Title/Prompt/Verify fields), BuildStepPrompt (generates prompt with header, progress checklist, task, verify criteria, signal instructions), and BuildRetryPrompt (re-prompt when STEP_DONE missing). WrapupStep type is defined here since parse.go doesn't exist yet — downstream tasks creating parse.go should either import from here or move the type.
data.title: Wrapup Harness — agent-driven post-epic steps from .tick/wrapup.md

data.note: 2026-04-06 14:32 - Wave 1 error on task nh9: open session: initialize: connection closed before response to initialize
data.title: Wrapup Harness — agent-driven post-epic steps from .tick/wrapup.md

data.reason: Created internal/wrapup/parse.go with ParseWrapupFile (reads .tick/wrapup.md), ParseWrapupSteps (agent-based decomposition with JSON retry), LoadCachedSteps/CacheSteps (cache in .tick/logs/wrapup-steps/). Reused WrapupStep type from step_prompt.go. Added parse_test.go with 12 tests covering valid/malformed JSON, retry, empty content, cache hit/miss, and JSON extraction.
data.title: Implement wrapup.md parser with agent-based step decomposition

data.note: 2026-04-06 14:34 - Task nh9 complete: Created internal/wrapup/parse.go with ParseWrapupFile, ParseWrapupSteps (agent decomposition with JSON retry on malformed response), parseStepsJSON (extracts JSON arrays even from markdown-fenced output), LoadCachedSteps/CacheSteps (cache dir: .tick/logs/wrapup-steps/<epic-id>.json). Reused WrapupStep type from step_prompt.go (task l0v) — no duplication. 12 tests in parse_test.go all passing.
data.title: Wrapup Harness — agent-driven post-epic steps from .tick/wrapup.md

data.reason: Implemented agent step execution loop in internal/wrapup/agent_steps.go with AgentStepResult, StepProgress types, WrapupRunner.RunAgentSteps method. Supports SessionAgent (single ACP session across steps) and one-shot fallback. Retry logic on missing STEP_DONE signal, ESCALATE handling, crash recovery via progress persistence in .tick/logs/wrapup-progress/. 8 tests covering all paths.
data.title: Implement agent step execution loop with ACP session support

data.note: 2026-04-06 14:37 - Task 451 complete: Created internal/wrapup/agent_steps.go with AgentStepResult (renamed from StepResult to avoid conflict with existing shell StepResult in wrapup.go), StepProgress, WrapupRunner types. RunAgentSteps supports SessionAgent (single session, Prompt per step) and one-shot fallback (Run per step). Retry on missing STEP_DONE up to MaxRetriesPerStep (default 2), ESCALATE marks step escalated and continues. Progress saved to .tick/logs/wrapup-progress/<epic-id>.json after each step for crash recovery. Test mocks prefixed with 'step' to avoid collision with parse_test.go mocks. 8 tests all passing.
data.title: Wrapup Harness — agent-driven post-epic steps from .tick/wrapup.md

data.reason: Added Agent field to wrapup.Runner and WrapupSteps to Report. Wired runAgentWrapupSteps() into Runner.Run() after shell steps — it reads .tick/wrapup.md, uses cached or agent-parsed steps, creates WrapupRunner, and appends results to report. Updated Markdown() to render wrapup steps as checklist with timing/cost/status. Passed agentImpl to Runner in run.go. Added 5 new tests.
data.title: Integrate agent wrapup into wrapup.Runner and tk run

data.note: 2026-04-06 14:40 - Task 07n complete: Added Agent field to Runner, WrapupSteps to Report. Runner.Run() calls runAgentWrapupSteps() after shell steps — reads wrapup.md, uses LoadCachedSteps or ParseWrapupSteps, creates WrapupRunner, appends AgentStepResults to report. Markdown() renders wrapup steps as checklist with timing/cost/status annotations. run.go passes agentImpl to Runner. 5 new tests added (markdown rendering with/without steps, no file, empty file, cached steps execution). All 26 wrapup tests pass.
data.title: Wrapup Harness — agent-driven post-epic steps from .tick/wrapup.md
